content_body: Great memories with our children as we closed out 2015 and kicked off 2016. The accommodations exceeded our expectations, the views left us speechless, and the historic district on Main Street was a great getaway throughout the week. We had great meals at Masseria, Harvest on Main, and Christy Lee's—be sure to give them a try! We certainly plan to return. Thank you for everything, including the sincere hospitality.
title: Certainly Plan To Return
